targets.query:
from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_access")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "session_duration_sec")
  |> group(columns: ["user_id"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "total_accesses"})
  |> sort(columns: ["total_accesses"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_access")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project_id == "proj_5")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action_type == "view")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "session_duration_sec")
  |> group(columns: ["document_id"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "view_count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["view_count"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_changes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "version_number")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with hour: date.hour(t: r._time)}))
  |> group(columns: ["hour", "change_type"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "change_count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["hour", "change_count"], desc: false)

from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_access")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "count")
